ground_truth.title: Smokeless Fire Pits Collection
ground_truth.main_content:
Learn About Our Smokeless Fire Pits

Find the Right Size for You

Three sizes of Smokeless Fire Pits | Ranger 15" | Bonfire 19.5" | Yukon 27"

Ranger 15" | Enjoy with 2-4 people

- Our most portable Smokeless Fire Pit
- Great for camping, smaller backyard spaces, and cozy family nights.

Bonfire 19.5" | Enjoy with 4-6 people

- The perfect blend of portable and permanent
- Great for backyard hangouts and family get togethers

Yukon 27" | Enjoy with 6-8 people

- A centerpiece of the backyard
- Great for larger gatherings and big nights together.

The Solo Stove Difference

Unrivaled Smokeless Tech

Our patented smokeless design and Signature 360° Airflow system maximize airflow to enable a secondary burn. This fuels hotter, more efficient fires, burning up to 400° hotter than a standard fire—and nearly eliminating all smoke. No more dodging smoky clouds or smelling like a campfire. Just pure fireside enjoyment.

Easy to Fire Up

Go from box to burn in minutes. Thanks to Signature 360° Airflow, anyone can easily light up a smokeless fire. Simply place your fuel inside and light your fire starter to kick up the flames in just a couple of minutes, whether you're a first-timer or a pro. You can add fuel as the fire dies down to keep the burn—and backyard hang—going strong.

Built to Last a Lifetime

Built to last and backed by an industry-leading lifetime warranty, our fire pits are crafted from premium 304 stainless steel—so you can enjoy season after season gathered around the fire with friends and family.

Easy Cleanup With Removable Ash Pan

No need for fancy tools or gadgets to clean your fire pit. Our removable ash pan rests beneath the base plate, catching all the ash in one place. Just lift, empty, and boom—you're ready for your next fire.

Extra Peace of Mind

These thoughtfully designed protective accessories were made to keep safety front and center for friends and family during every burn.

Cook Over Smokeless Flames

Our cooking accessories turn your smokeless fire pit into a flavor hub for tailgates, camp outs, and more.

Storage Solutions

Explore storage accessories built to tuck away fuel, smokeless fire pits, and more while elevating your outdoor space.

Over 222,000 5 Star Reviews... and Counting

"Our Solo Stove fire pit brings us together in the best way possible. After a long day, the time that we all look forward to is coming back to camp and slowing down." – Sara A.

Shop the World's Most Popular Smokeless Fire Pits

Lifetime warranty. Unrivaled smokeless tech. Premium stainless steel. Over 222,000+ five-star reviews. There's lots of reasons to love a Solo Stove.
